program.name: CRM Mock Lookup
intake.purpose: Lookup a CRM account through an in-memory mock adapter and compute eligibility from the mock account data.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"crm_lookup","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.account_id","runtime.now"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","adapter_kind":"in_memory_mock","account_id":"string","tier":"string","active_contract":"boolean","mocked_at":"ISO timestamp string"},"items_json":["account:<account_id>","tier:<tier>"]},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","Use only the in-memory mock CRM catalog; do not call a network or external service.","The mock catalog contains account acct-1001 with tier gold and active_contract true.","For a known account, echo account_id, tier, active_contract, adapter_kind, and mocked_at = runtime.now().","For an unknown account, return adapter_kind in_memory_mock, active_contract false, and a tier of unknown while preserving the requested account_id."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal crm_lookup.","adapter_kind must be in_memory_mock in both result_json and StageOutput.adapter_kind.","items_json must be exactly [\"account:<account_id>\", \"tier:<tier>\"] using the lookup result."]}},{"slug":"eligibility_score","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.requested_seats","crm_lookup.output.result_json.tier","crm_lookup.output.result_json.active_contract"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","account_id":"string","requested_seats":"number","eligible":"boolean","reason":"string"},"items_json":["eligible:<eligible>"]},"rules":["Parse crm_lookup.output.result_json before computing.","Eligibility is true only when active_contract is true and the account tier can support the requested seats.","Tier seat limits are bronze = 10, silver = 20, gold = 50, platinum = 250, enterprise = 1000.","reason must be gold_tier_capacity_available when active_contract is true, tier is gold, and requested_seats is less than or equal to 50.","reason must be inactive_contract when active_contract is false; otherwise reason must be tier_capacity_exceeded when requested_seats exceeds the tier limit."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal eligibility_score.","result_json must use exactly the declared key order: stage, account_id, requested_seats, eligible, reason.","items_json must be exactly [\"eligible:<eligible>\"].","account_id and requested_seats must be top-level fields; do not include tier in result_json."]}},{"slug":"complete","is_terminal":true}]
